name: Spicy Sessions
overview: Each episode features one guest who performs songs for the audience, collaborates with Kurosawa and Nakanishi, and discusses their musical roots. Another highlight of the program is the spicy sessions with the studio band that arise from the flow of conversation.

trailers.title: 【Spicy Sessions】セッション音楽番組に潜入し、歌声を分析します。【黒沢 薫 × 中西アルノ】
